title: Uproar
description:
Deal 5 damage twice.
Play a random Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description:
Deal 7 damage twice.
Play a random Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
notes: Plays a random Attack from your Draw Pile. Prioritizes attacks that are not marked Unplayable; if none are available, will play any Attack including unplayable ones.
